ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bee Colonies" (
  "colony_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bee colony */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the colony */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total number of bees in the colony */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Health status of the colony */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the colony was established */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of bees in the colony */,
  "environment_quality" INTEGER /* Rating of the environment quality (1-10) */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection of the colony */,
  "inspection_frequency" TEXT /* How often the colony is inspected (e.g., weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("colony_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bees" (
  "bee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bee */,
  "colony_id" INTEGER /* ID of the colony the bee belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the bee (e.g., grabber, stinger) */,
  "preference" REAL /* Preference for a specific task (0.0 - 1.0) */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the bee */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the bee */,
  "last_health_check" TEXT /* Date of the last health check */,
  "health_history" TEXT /* Brief history of the bee's health issues */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of environment (e.g., meadow, forest) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates (latitude, longitude) */,
  "average_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature of the environment */,
  "average_humidity" REAL /* Average humidity of the environment */,
  "pollution_level" TEXT /* Level of pollution in the environment (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the researcher (e.g., lead researcher, assistant) */,
  "research_focus" TEXT /* Specific area of research focus */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the researcher's last login to the system */,
  "activity_level" TEXT /* Measure of the researcher's activity level (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_findings" (
  "finding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research finding */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who made the finding */,
  "colony_id" INTEGER /* ID of the colony the finding pertains to */,
  "finding_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the research finding */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the finding was published */,
  "finding_type" TEXT /* Type of finding (e.g., behavioral, health, environmental) */,
  "impact_level" TEXT /* Level of impact of the finding (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the finding (0.0 - 1.0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("finding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_findings_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environment_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental factor */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment where the factor is present */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the environmental factor */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the factor on bee populations */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the factor started affecting the environment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the factor stopped affecting the environment */,
  "factor_intensity" INTEGER /* Intensity of the factor (1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environment_factors_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bee_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bee role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the bee role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Brief description of the responsibilities associated with the role */,
  "average_lifespan" INTEGER /* Average lifespan of bees in this role (in days) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bee_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "bee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bee with the preference */,
  "task" TEXT /* Task for which the bee has a preference */,
  "preference_level" REAL /* Level of preference for the task (0.0 - 1.0) */,
  "preference_reason" TEXT /* Brief reason for the preference */,
  "preference_duration" TEXT /* Duration for which the preference is valid (e.g., 1 month, 6 months) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bee_preferences_bee_id FOREIGN KEY ("bee_id") REFERENCES bees ("bee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bee_health" (
  "health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health record */,
  "bee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bee the record pertains to */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Health status of the bee */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date when the bee was inspected */,
  "health_issue" TEXT /* Brief description of any health issues */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment given for health issues */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next health inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bee_health_bee_id FOREIGN KEY ("bee_id") REFERENCES bees ("bee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bee_population_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population trend record */,
  "colony_id" INTEGER /* ID of the colony the trend pertains to */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the population size was recorded */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Size of the bee population on the recorded date */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  "trend_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the trend (0.0 - 1.0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the user has */,
  "last_access" TEXT /* Date of the last access to the system */,
  "access_history" TEXT /* Brief history of access events */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
